title: Question: include/verilated_vcd_c.h:50:13: error: ‘ssize_t’ does not name a type
body:
---


Author Name: **Fabien M** (@Martoni)
Original Redmine Message: 1613 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hi,

I'm trying to test verilator (git trunk version) on my debian/Linux operating systems and I discovered this compilation bug when I wanted to compile my testbench :
```
In file included from Vbutton_deb__Trace.cpp:3:0,
                  from Vbutton_deb__ALLsup.cpp:3:
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_c.h:50:13: error: ‘ssize_t’ does not name a type
      virtual ssize_t write(const char* bufp, ssize_t len);
              ^

```

To solve it, I patched the file include/verilatedos.h with the following patch :

```
From 0a61d63e7424d4ca5f5eca195474703dfb781d6b Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: Fabien Marteau <fabien.marteau@armadeus.com>
Date: Mon, 16 Mar 2015 09:46:28 +0100
Subject: [PATCH] include/verilatedos.h: adding unistd.h for ssize_t (in
 Linux/Unix)

Signed-off-by: Fabien Marteau <fabien.marteau@armadeus.com>
---
 include/verilatedos.h | 1 +
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+)

diff --git a/include/verilatedos.h b/include/verilatedos.h
index fafc05d..7916ad1 100644
--- a/include/verilatedos.h
+++ b/include/verilatedos.h
@@ -178,6 +178,7 @@ typedef signed   __int32        ssize_t;        ///< signed size_t; returned fro
 #else // Linux or compliant Unix flavors, -m64
 
 # include <stdint.h>	// Linux and most flavors
+# include <unistd.h>
 # include <inttypes.h>	// Solaris
 typedef uint8_t			vluint8_t;	///< 32-bit unsigned type
 typedef uint16_t		vluint16_t;	///< 32-bit unsigned type
-- 
2.1.4

```

And that compile well now. Do you think I'm wrong doing this ?
I don't know how to submit a patch for verilator.
code_blocks:
In file included from Vbutton_deb__Trace.cpp:3:0,
                  from Vbutton_deb__ALLsup.cpp:3:
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_c.h:50:13: error: ‘ssize_t’ does not name a type
      virtual ssize_t write(const char* bufp, ssize_t len);
              ^

From 0a61d63e7424d4ca5f5eca195474703dfb781d6b Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: Fabien Marteau <fabien.marteau@armadeus.com>
Date: Mon, 16 Mar 2015 09:46:28 +0100
Subject: [PATCH] include/verilatedos.h: adding unistd.h for ssize_t (in
 Linux/Unix)

Signed-off-by: Fabien Marteau <fabien.marteau@armadeus.com>
---
 include/verilatedos.h | 1 +
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+)

diff --git a/include/verilatedos.h b/include/verilatedos.h
index fafc05d..7916ad1 100644
--- a/include/verilatedos.h
+++ b/include/verilatedos.h
@@ -178,6 +178,7 @@ typedef signed   __int32        ssize_t;        ///< signed size_t; returned fro
 #else // Linux or compliant Unix flavors, -m64
 
 # include <stdint.h>	// Linux and most flavors
+# include <unistd.h>
 # include <inttypes.h>	// Solaris
 typedef uint8_t			vluint8_t;	///< 32-bit unsigned type
 typedef uint16_t		vluint16_t;	///< 32-bit unsigned type
-- 
2.1.4
